LanguageData.Ammo_Doom2016PlasmaCell.label: UAC Plasma Cell
LanguageData.Ammo_Doom2016PlasmaCell.description: Plasma containment power cell developed by the Union Aerospace Corporation for heavy energy weapons, utilizing the compression of Argent energy
LanguageData.Bullet_Doom2016PlasmaGun.label: Plasma Shot
LanguageData.Bullet_Doom2016VortexRifle.label: Plasma Shot
